This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include these codes as defined in http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/allergyintolerance-clinical
    CodeDisplayDefinitionVF_allergyActive
    activeactiveThe subject is currently experiencing, or is at risk of, a reaction to the identified substance.
  • Include these codes as defined in http://va.gov/terminology/vistaDefinedElements/120.8-22
    CodeDisplayVF_allergyActive
    <null>ENTERED IN ERROR - NULL<active

name: VF_allergyActive
title: VF_allergyActive
description:
Navigate to [ConceptMap VF_allergyActive](ConceptMap-CMVFallergyActive.html)

> Note that the FHIR binding is to the codes in the fhir system. The codes from the VistADefinedElements system are map source codes: they may be included in addition to the fhir codes, but they don't address the binding requirement.
